text.title: Go Concurrency Patterns (Worker Pool, Fan-Out/Fan-In, errgroup, Pipeline) Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every Go Concurrency Patterns (Worker Pool, Fan-Out/Fan-In, errgroup, Pipeline) application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Pattern choice MUST follow the matrix: worker-pool (IO) / fan-out-fan-in (CPU) / errgroup (fail-fast) / pipeline (streaming).
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal benchmarks. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Concurrent goroutine count MUST be capped by a semaphore or fixed pool size.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Effective Go. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Every task signature MUST take `context.Context` and honour cancellation.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Go context docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Worker goroutines MUST recover panics and convert to errors; never let panic kill the pool.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: stdlib + reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Use `golang.org/x/sync/errgroup` with `WithContext` when first error aborts siblings.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: x/sync docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: In-flight duplicate calls MUST be deduped via `golang.org/x/sync/singleflight`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: x/sync docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Every pattern MUST ship a `TestNoLeak` using `goleak.VerifyNone(t)`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: goleak docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
